name: Scene Storyboard
description: Visual storyboard grid displaying video scenes as reorderable cards with thumbnails, duration badges, and notes for pre-production and AI video planning.

grid.description: Responsive card grid of scene thumbnails with metadata badges and drag-to-reorder, suitable for overview and planning views

strip.description: Horizontal scrollable film-strip layout showing scenes connected by thin sequence lines, ideal for linear narrative review

detail.description: Two-column layout with storyboard grid on left and selected-scene script and notes panel on right for detailed review

visual_brief: A grid of 16:9 aspect ratio scene cards (approximately 280x158px image area) rendered as rounded-corner cards with subtle shadow. Each card has a thumbnail preview image filling the top 70%, with a scene number badge (e.g. 'Scene 04') overlaid top-left in a small dark pill. Duration badge sits bottom-right on the thumbnail (e.g. '0:12') in a dark translucent pill with monospace numbers. A drag handle (6-dot grip icon) appears top-right on card hover, fading in at 150ms. Scene notes display below the thumbnail as 2-line truncated body text in muted color. Selected scene card has a 2px accent-color border with a subtle glow. In strip preset, cards sit in a horizontal scrolling row connected by thin 1px horizontal lines between them, suggesting narrative flow. Detail preset shows the grid at 60% width with a parchment-style script sidebar showing the selected scene's dialogue and action lines in serif typography.

slots.scene-card: Repeating card (d-surface, data-interactive) sized to maintain 16:9 thumbnail aspect with text area below. Minimum 240px wide, maximum 320px. Has border-radius 12px and subtle shadow that lifts on hover.
slots.scene-thumbnail: Image area at top of card rendering the scene preview. Fills 100% card width, 16:9 aspect ratio. Lazy-loaded with skeleton shimmer fallback. Supports image or video poster frame.
slots.scene-number-overlay: Small pill badge positioned absolutely at top-left of thumbnail with 8px inset. Dark translucent background, white text, font-size 11px, font-weight 600.
slots.duration-badge: Pill badge at bottom-right of thumbnail with 8px inset. Dark translucent backdrop-blur background. Monospace font for timecode display.
slots.drag-handle: 6-dot grip icon at top-right of card, opacity 0 by default, opacity 1 on hover. Cursor grab/grabbing. Initiates drag-and-drop reorder.
slots.scene-notes: Text area below thumbnail with 12px padding. Shows scene description in 2-line clamp with ellipsis. Font-size 13px, text-muted color.

responsive.mobile: Single column grid with full-width cards. Strip preset uses snap-scroll for one-card-at-a-time horizontal navigation. Detail preset stacks script below grid.
responsive.tablet: 2-column grid. Detail sidebar collapses to bottom sheet on scene selection.
responsive.desktop: 4-column grid (3-column for detail preset). Full hover interactions and drag reordering enabled.

layout_hints.sequence_priority: Scene order and narrative flow should remain obvious before note detail. The board should feel like a planning surface for sequence, not just a collection of thumbnails.
layout_hints.detail_attachment: When a scene is selected, its notes or script should feel attached to that card and not like a separate disconnected editor.
layout_hints.strip_mode: The strip preset should reinforce left-to-right narrative progression rather than behaving like a generic horizontal gallery.

layout_hints.sequence_priority: Scene order and narrative flow should remain obvious before note detail. The board should feel like a planning surface for sequence, not just a collection of thumbnails.
layout_hints.detail_attachment: When a scene is selected, its notes or script should feel attached to that card and not like a separate disconnected editor.
layout_hints.strip_mode: The strip preset should reinforce left-to-right narrative progression rather than behaving like a generic horizontal gallery.

transitions.card-reorder: FLIP animation 300ms ease-in-out for grid repositioning

ambient.thumbnail-load: skeleton shimmer 1.5s linear infinite until loaded
